cases.title: System eligibility evaluation pass/fail deterministic with reason per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true in EventRuleConfig
Two Attended registrations: one with mandatory feedback submitted, one without
System eligibility evaluation triggered via eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for each participant
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for Attended participant with submitted feedback
Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for Attended participant without feedback
cases.expected: First call returns Eligible with non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; second returns NotEligible with NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK; aligns with testing-plan §3 row: Eligibility evaluation pass/fail → deterministic with reason (AC-09, BR-17..BR-19)

cases.title: System evaluates Eligible when mandatory feedback configured and participant submitted feedback
preconditions: Completed event with EventRuleConfig.feedbackRequired true
Registration in Attended state with Feedback row linked to registrationId
No prior certificate_eligibilities row for registrationId
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities row by registrationId in same database session after commit
cases.expected: System computes Eligible using attendance baseline (BR-17) and mandatory feedback completion (BR-18); persisted row stores Eligible with reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt per BR-19 in one transaction

cases.title: System evaluates NotEligible when mandatory feedback configured but not submitted
preconditions: Completed event with EventRuleConfig.feedbackRequired true
Registration in Attended state with no Feedback submission
Attendance finalization already applied
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities row for the registration
cases.expected: System returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK and explanatory reasonText; configured mandatory-feedback rule enforced per BR-14 and BR-18; outcome persisted with reason per BR-19

cases.title: CertificateEligibility transitions from PendingEvaluation to Eligible on passAllRules
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired false in EventRuleConfig
Attended registration with no prior eligibility evaluation
certificate_eligibilities row absent or in PendingEvaluation
steps: Read certificate_eligibilities beforeState for registrationId
Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for Attended participant
Read certificate_eligibilities afterState
cases.expected: beforeState is PendingEvaluation or row created; afterState result is Eligible with non-empty reason fields; terminal transition per state machine §3 Certificate Eligibility lifecycle

cases.title: System evaluates Eligible for Attended participant when feedback is optional in rule config
preconditions: Completed event with EventRuleConfig.feedbackRequired false
Registration in Attended state with no Feedback row
Authenticated Participant actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility(eventId, participantId, participantContext)
cases.expected: System returns result Eligible with reasonCode ELIGIBLE and non-empty reasonText; optional feedback policy from configured rules does not block certificate eligibility per Workflow E step 3

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me returns HTTP 200 with Eligible and reason fields
preconditions: E2E fixture: Completed event with Attended participant who submitted mandatory feedback
Participant JWT for the registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with Authorization bearer token
Verify HTTP status code and payload fields per API design §2.4
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, non-empty reasonText, and evaluatedAt (ISO-8601); FR-20 system evaluation exposed to participant self-service endpoint

cases.title: Flow A system evaluates certificate eligibility after feedback in full lifecycle
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, event completion, and feedback submission
Event configured with mandatory feedback via EventRuleConfig
Participant JWT from prior flow steps
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant Authorization bearer token after feedback submit
Parse result, reasonCode, and reasonText fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with terminal result Eligible and non-empty reason fields; Flow A draft-to-eligibility path completes with system-evaluated outcome per testing plan Flow A and scenario matrix

cases.title: GET eligibility/me returns system-evaluated Eligible or NotEligible with reason
preconditions: Completed event with attendance finalized to Attended or Absent
Eligibility evaluation triggered on first query
Participant JWT for own registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant bearer token
Verify response envelope fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result Eligible or NotEligible (never PendingEvaluation in API response), reasonCode, reasonText, and evaluatedAt

cases.title: Participant sees system-evaluated eligibility result with reason after Flow 5
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on Completed event
Feedback submitted when mandatory or window open when optional
Participation history or event detail exposes eligibility result panel
steps: Navigate to event detail or participation history eligibility section
Observe displayed eligibility status badge and reason text
cases.expected: UI shows terminal Eligible or NotEligible with human-readable reason per Flow 5 step 4; not stuck in PendingEvaluation after system runs configured rules

cases.title: System reads EventRuleConfig feedbackRequired when evaluating eligibility per event
preconditions: Two Completed events: Event A with feedbackRequired true, Event B with feedbackRequired false
Identical Attended registrations without feedback for both events
steps: Evaluate eligibility for Event A registration via eligibilityService.getMyEligibility
Evaluate eligibility for Event B registration with same attendance profile
cases.expected: Event A evaluates NotEligible (NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK); Event B evaluates Eligible; system applies per-event configured business rules not a global default

cases.title: System evaluates Absent registration as NotEligible with attendance reason
preconditions: Completed event with any feedback configuration
Registration in Absent state after event completion finalization
Feedback may or may not exist
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility for Absent participant
cases.expected: System returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE; attendance baseline rule fails regardless of feedback per BR-17

cases.title: System evaluation order checks attendance before mandatory feedback rule
preconditions: Event with feedbackRequired true in EventRuleConfig
Registration not in Attended state (e.g. Absent)
No feedback submitted
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.getMyEligibility with non-Attended registration and null feedback
cases.expected: System returns NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE (not NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK); deterministic fixed rule evaluation order per eligibility module guardrails

cases.title: GET eligibility/me before attendance finalization returns HTTP 404 NOT_FOUND
preconditions: Published event with participant Registered but event not yet completed to Attended/Absent
Participant JWT for that registration
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant token before attendance finalization
cases.expected: HTTP 404 with error.code NOT_FOUND; no Eligible/NotEligible payload returned prematurely; system defers evaluation until attendance is finalized per domain lifecycle semantics

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET eligibility/me returns HTTP 401
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility records
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no eligibility data leaked; protected eligibility endpoint requires authenticated session

cases.title: Concurrent system eligibility evaluations produce single consistent persisted result
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant meeting all configured rules
No prior certificate_eligibilities row
Two parallel getMyEligibility calls for same registrationId
steps: Launch two concurrent eligibility evaluation requests with identical inputs
Query certificate_eligibilities rows after both settle
cases.expected: Exactly one persisted eligibility row; both calls return same terminal result and reasonCode; no conflicting duplicate evaluation records

cases.title: System re-evaluates and updates stored result when feedback submitted after initial NotEligible
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback and Attended participant
Initial evaluation returned NotEligible due to missing feedback
Participant subsequently submits feedback within window
steps: Trigger initial eligibility evaluation (observe NotEligible)
Submit feedback via feedbackService.submit
Trigger eligibility evaluation again via getMyEligibility
cases.expected: Second evaluation returns Eligible and persists updated certificate_eligibilities row with new evaluatedAt; system refreshes outcome when configured rule inputs change

cases.title: System eligibility rule evaluation is deterministic for identical inputs
preconditions: Fixed registration, EventRuleConfig, and feedback fixtures
Deterministic test controls with fixed clock per testing plan section 7
steps: Invoke getMyEligibility twice with identical preconditions
Compare result, reasonCode, and reasonText across both responses
cases.expected: Both invocations return identical terminal result and reason fields; satisfies scenario matrix 'deterministic with reason' and eligibility module deterministic rule evaluation order

cases.title: Every system evaluation output includes reasonCode and reasonText per INV-05
preconditions: Completed events covering Eligible and NotEligible outcomes
Mix of optional and mandatory feedback configurations
steps: Evaluate eligibility for Eligible Attended case with optional feedback
Evaluate eligibility for NotEligible Absent case
Evaluate eligibility for NotEligible missing mandatory feedback case
Inspect each persisted EligibilityReason payload
cases.expected: All terminal outputs include non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; never returns result without reason; satisfies INV-05 and BR-19 eligibility reason requirement

cases.title: NotEligible participant sees reason text explaining missing mandatory feedback
preconditions: Participant logged in with Attended registration on Completed event
Event configured with mandatory feedback; participant has not submitted feedback
Eligibility evaluation triggered via navigation or prior API call
steps: Navigate to participation history or event detail eligibility section
Observe NotEligible badge and reason messaging
cases.expected: UI displays NotEligible status with human-readable reason referencing feedback requirement; aligns with eligibility result panel spec and Flow 5

cases.title: GET eligibility/me returns HTTP 200 NotEligible with NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK reason
preconditions: Completed event with feedbackRequired true
Attended participant with no feedback submission
Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me with participant bearer token
Parse response eligibility fields
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with result NotEligible, reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK, and non-empty reasonText; system evaluation outcome accessible on subsequent reads
